name: statusline
description: Multi-provider status bar with context health, API rate limits (Anthropic 5h/7d + z.ai GLM tokens/tools), git branch, and active tools. Auto-detects provider from model name. Supports 1/2/3 line layouts with smart hiding.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-provider status bar with context health, API rate limits (Anthropic 5h/7d + z.ai GLM tokens/tools), git branch, and active tools. Auto-detects provider from model name. Supports 1/2/3 line layouts with smart hiding.
